sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT lang FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT timeZone FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT tenant_id FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE property_name = 'DomainName' AND property_value = #DOMAIN_NAME#
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, server_name serverName FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, tenant_name tenantName FROM TBL_TENANT
SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
SELECT property_name, property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #property_value# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND userID = #userID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, "PROPERTY_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "PROPERTY_VALUE" NVARCHAR2(2000) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "PK2_TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "COMPANY_ID", "PROPERTY_NAME") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #propertyValue# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAIL FROM JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION ADD MAIL VARCHAR2(100 CHAR) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ORDERBY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD ORDERBY NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ipno FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ACCESS_IP" ( "IPNO" NUMBER(*,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, "IPADDRESS" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "ACCESS" VARCHAR2(10 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EXPLANATION" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), CONSTRAINT "TBL_ACCESS_IP_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("IPNO") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT accessno FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ACCESS_ID" ( "ACCESSNO" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, "CN" VARCHAR2(80 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ACCESS_ID_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ACCESSNO") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT domain_name FROM JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION_SUB WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION_SUB" ( "DOMAIN_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(100), "SUB_MAIL" NVARCHAR2(100), "SUB_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), CONSTRAINT "JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION_SUB_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME", "SUB_MAIL"), CONSTRAINT "FK_DISTRIBUTION_SUB" FOREIGN KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME") REFERENCES "JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION" ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME") ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE )
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG NVARCHAR2(2) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_DEPTMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG NVARCHAR2(2) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT sign_no FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_MAIL_SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE ( SIGN_NO NUMBER NOT NULL , CONTENT LONG , DISPLAYNAME VARCHAR2(45) , DISPLAYNAME2 VARCHAR2(45) , TENANT_ID NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL , COMPANY_ID VARCHAR2(45) , CONSTRAINT SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE_PK PRIMARY KEY ( SIGN_NO ) ENABLE )
sqlMap.select: SELECT JOBID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_USER_JOBMASTER" ( "JOBID" NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TYPE" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CN" NVARCHAR2(100), "DISPLAYNAME" NVARCHAR2(200), "DISPLAYNAME2" NVARCHAR2(200), "USEFLAG" NVARCHAR2(2), "SORT" NUMBER(10,0), "CREATEDATE" DATE, "COMPANYID" VARCHAR2(40 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_USER_JOBMASTER_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("JOBID", "TYPE", "COMPANYID", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #confName#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_config (tenant_id, property_name, property_value, description, config_name, regdate) VALUES (#tenantID#, #confName#, #property_value#, #description#, #config_name#, sysdate)
sqlMap.select: SELECT JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD JOBID VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL
